---
title: "Overview"
---

**Session goals:**

- See AI in action: live code understanding, reision, and reuse with AI
- Software setup overview: Positron + GitHub Copilot + Stata
- Understand how AI models work and learn key vocabulary:
  - IDE, LLM, Assistant, tokens, prompts, context window, agent, plan.
- What AI can and cannot do for your coding workflow
- Get ready to practice on your own.

By the end of this session you should be able to use AI independently on your
own computer and be ready for the self-study exercises.

## Agenda

### Part 1 — Setup & Live Demo (80 min)

| Time   | Topic |
|--------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| 10 min | Welcome, introductions, and overview |
| 30 min | Software overview: Positron, GitHub Copilot, and Stata setup |
| 40 min | AI in action with Stata/R: my typical data workflow |

### ☕ Break (10 min)

### Part 2 — Concepts & Practice (90 min)

| Time   | Topic |
|--------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| 30 min | AI overview presentation: how GitHub Copilot and LLMs work, key concepts, and capabilities |
| 30 min | Cookbook: securing sensitive data, guardrails, and responsible AI use |
| 30 min | Self-study exercises overview and Q&A |

## Before You Arrive

Make sure all prerequisites are complete:

1. [Software Setup](../prerequisites/software.qmd)
2. [GitHub Setup](../prerequisites/github.qmd)
3. [Positron Extensions](../prerequisites/extensions.qmd)
4. [Positron Assistant](../prerequisites/assistant.qmd)

If you run into issues, check [Common Problems](../prerequisites/common-problems.qmd) or
contact [ITHelp@worldbankgroup.org](mailto:ITHelp@worldbankgroup.org) before the session.

## Slides

### Introductions, and overview

<div>

```{=html}
<iframe src="day1/ai4coding-slides-d1-1.html" title="Quarto Slides"></iframe>
```
</div>

View slides in a [new tab](ai4coding-slides-d1-1.qmd) or download [PDF version](day1/ai4coding-slides-d1-1.pdf).

<!-- ### Setup overview

<div class="ratio ratio-16x9">
  <iframe src="ai4coding-slides-d1-2.html" title="Quarto Slides"></iframe>
</div>

### AI in action with Stata/R

### Core AI concepts

<div class="ratio ratio-16x9">
  <iframe src="ai4coding-slides-d1-3.html" title="Quarto Slides"></iframe>
</div> -->
